summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LearnHub platform - Backend APIs 100% functional including new AI features and Study Rooms. Frontend core features working with animations and images, but some UI components not displaying data properly.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 0 badge cards when should display 6 badges from backend API
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot see available badges or track achievements

ui_bugs.issue: ASK QUESTION button not found, no forum threads visible despite backend having threads
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot create new forum questions or see existing threads

integration_issues.issue: CREATE ROOM form submits successfully but created rooms don't appear in room list
integration_issues.impact: Users can create rooms but cannot see or join them

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent display - sometimes shows 3 recommendations, sometimes shows none

passed_tests: Landing page: Hero image, 6 feature cards with images, animations (stagger classes), stats bar
Login flow: admin@learnhub.com / Admin@123 works, redirects to dashboard
Dashboard: Stats grid (6 cards), quick links with images including Study Rooms
AI Learning Path: GET RECOMMENDATIONS button works, returns real AI recommendations
Code Sandbox: Monaco editor loads, RUN CODE button functional, Python execution works
Study Planner: ADD TASK button opens form, kanban columns layout (TODO/IN PROGRESS/DONE)
Study Rooms: Page loads, CREATE ROOM form opens and accepts input
Navigation sidebar: All pages accessible, Study Rooms link present
No 'Made with Emergent' watermark visible (successfully hidden via CSS)
CSS animations working: fadeInUp, slideIn, scaleIn, pulse, float classes
All 27 Backend APIs working: auth, courses, progress, badges, planner, forum, sandbox, AI, study rooms
AI now uses Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o) - no longer shows 'I couldn't generate a response'
Forum AI Answer: GET AI ANSWER button works and returns real AI responses
Backend Study Rooms API: GET /api/rooms and POST /api/rooms working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend data display issues: 1) Badges page not showing 6 badges from API, 2) Q&A Forum not displaying threads or ASK QUESTION button, 3) Study Rooms created successfully but not appearing in room list. These are likely frontend state management or API integration issues rather than backend problems.
